_comment: This file is for CLAUDE CODE developers working on this repo, pointing at the local dev build. For END USERS who installed via Homebrew, register maccrab-mcp from your $PATH — copy the `mcpServers` block into ~/.claude/settings.json or ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json and replace the `command` value with the absolute path printed by `which maccrab-mcp` (typically /opt/homebrew/bin/maccrab-mcp on Apple Silicon, /usr/local/bin/maccrab-mcp on Intel).

maccrab.description: MacCrab threat detection engine — query alerts, events, campaigns, security score, and hunt threats
